purpose: Scale the persona-vs-context factorial for inference (CIs). 6 new manuscripts (case-control, cross-sectional, diagnostic, prediction/TRIPOD, scoping review, RCT) pooled with trial 02 (4 manuscripts) → 10 manuscripts x 6 arms x 2 reps on the deployable model.
context_arm_grounding: reporting-guideline checklist (identical to trials 01/02 — pools with trial 02)
pools_with: trials/02-qwen3_6-27b-checklist (4 manuscripts) → 10 manuscripts total for the mixed-effects analysis
